title: Seri's Transparent System Messages
description: Annoyed  by the  Blue system messages while joining servers? no more this texture pack makes the system message transparent!
body:
# **🎮 Transparent System Messages - Clean Join UI 🧼**
Tired of that chunky, annoying system message box when joining a Minecraft server?
Yeah... us too. 😤

This lightweight texture pack does one simple, beautiful thing:
✨ It makes the system messages (like "Joining World..." and "Encrypting...") completely transparent!
No more clunky black boxes or distracting overlays ruining your clean aesthetic. Just smooth, minimal vibes. 😎

## **🔧 What’s Changed?**
- ✅ Removed that ugly texture behind system messages
- 
- ✅ Made the joining/loading texts seamlessly transparent
- 
- ✅ Works with almost all versions and resource packs
- 
- ✅ Perfect for content creators, builders, and anyone who loves a clean UI

### **🚀 Plug & Play!**
No configs. No nonsense. Just drop it in and enjoy the silence... (well, visual silence 😉)
